name: Stella Can't Hear
short_description: Key Features: Explore 20+ Levels of Platforming challenges. Discover and rescue 9 other Dog Friends Unique Tap-to-Tell Movement system. Agility Course level to refine reaction speed. Complete the Stella-Pedia to learn about Real World Stella.
detailed_description:
Point-and-Click Platformer: In this unique platforming adventure, Players guide the deaf dog Stella through a wide variety of environments in her goal to reach the end of each level. Stella will need you to point where you'd like her to go, not control her directly. Remember, she can't hear you, but she can see where you point. While Stella is pretty smart, she needs your help to navigate complex or challenging puzzles. Run, jump, crawl, and climb through all the courses! Just don't forget to hydrate! Stella runs slower and jumps lower when she's too thirsty.

Dress for Success: Stella can equip several different collars while adventuring. Each one provides a unique bonus. For example the Red Collar makes her run faster, and the Green Collar makes her jump higher.

Collect all Bones: In each level there are tons of bones to collect. Some are more hidden than others. Collect all the bones in each level to unlock more lore about the real world Stella.

Compete with Speed: Each level has a starting amount of points, which ticks down over time. Collecting bones awards more points, and completing the level quickly will keep your score intact. Balance speed with exploration to maximize your run score.

Discover new Friends:  In some levels Stella can discover new friends, which can be visited in the Dog Park from the main menu. All Dogs are based on real world dogs as well.
